visual_description: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a maroon jacket over a plaid shirt and blue jeans, stands in a dimly lit room with his mouth open in surprise. He turns and walks away from the camera toward a closed white door, holding a small object in his hand. A bedside lamp glows, a bed and a bookshelf are visible in the background.
